_meta.review_notes: Red dot superimposed on blue dot (fight/flight freeze) → Locus Coeruleus. High BUN/Creatinine ratio → EMF Cord. No 'Cervical Support' setting. BE MORE ATTENTIVE double = 2 scoops (standard 1, double 2). X-39 Day 1. Deuterium Drops for redox lab findings. Everyone is seen 2x/week; BE MORE ATTENTIVE means more than that.

corrections.locus_coeruleus: Red dot superimposed on blue dot (fight/flight freeze pattern) → Locus Coeruleus frequency required alongside SNS Balance
corrections.emf_cord: High BUN/Creatinine ratio → EMF Cord frequency
corrections.cell_synergy_dose: Standard = 1 scoop. BE MORE ATTENTIVE double = 2 scoops. Never 4 scoops.
corrections.cervical_support: No such frequency setting — do not use it
corrections.deuterium_drops: Redox lab findings (elevated LDH, oxidative markers) trigger Deuterium Drops
corrections.session_frequency: Standard is 2x/week for all patients. BE MORE ATTENTIVE means MORE than 2x/week (e.g. 3x/week).
corrections.be_more_attentive_dose: BE MORE ATTENTIVE double dose = 2 scoops (not 4)

session_frequency_recommendation: 3+ times per week (BE MORE ATTENTIVE on both Ortho and Valsalva)
cytolower_gate_reason: VCS 12/32; must address Leptin first (Biotoxin + Leptin Resist + Adipothin + diet), then MSH
